name: com.baseprojectpackages.utilities
description: General-purpose runtime and editor helpers for Unity projects. Includes serializable dictionaries and a flattened 2D array, a tracked coroutine runner and a generic singleton base, class-tagged rich-text logging, type-safe 2D and UI raycasting, platform and build flags, prefab instantiation helpers plus audio, math, string, component, rotation and time-formatting extensions. Editor helpers cover serialized-property lookups, object-reference popups and serializable defaults. All under the Base.UtilityPackage namespace.
